_readme: Optional art-direction overrides for the weather system (WEATHER.md). Defaults live in code; this file overrides any subset by field name - delete a line to fall back. Unknown keys like this one are ignored. If two multiplayer machines want identical skies, keep this file identical (it does NOT affect the join handshake).
_storms: Rotating spiral-arm density wave + finite storm lives.
_cover: Global cloud-cover variance (hemisphere-scale breaks and dense belts).
_motion: Bounded zonal shear slosh; the base rotation is in code.
